description: Инструкции для агента при обнаружении ошибок, противоречий или dead end ситуаций.

loop.details: Write to log.md with type [error], description, and context. Always append (>>), never overwrite.
Brief analysis: what went wrong, why instruction broke (not just 'error', but root cause)

strategies.local-fix: local problem (path, link, logic) → fix independently
strategies.schema-patch: contradiction in Schema/AGENTS.md → propose patch to user for review
strategies.source-conflict: two sources say opposite things → mark as CONFLICT on page and continue
strategies.dead-end: approach doesn't work (e.g., grep gave noise) → document reason, change strategy

loop.details: Move forward on task, not stuck on broken instruction

examples.action: [!] Log: protected zone blocked → local-fix: switch to git add wiki/
[!] Log: truncation detected → local-fix: fallback web_search + get_search_content

examples.situation: New command incompatible with current Schema
examples.action: [!] Log: schema conflict → schema-patch: propose AGENTS.md patch to user
[!] Log: grep noise → dead-end: switch to index.md

golden_rule: Error ≠ stop. Every error is a signal for action, not reason to stall.
